children.heading: Establishment
children.label: a Establishment
children.text: To further the purposes of , the Secretary shall establish a special management area consisting of certain Federal lands in the Cooperative Management and Protection Area, as depicted on the map referred to in , which shall be known as the Wildlands Juniper Management Area.section 460nnn–23(c) of this titlesection 460nnn–11(a) of this title

children.heading: Management
children.label: b Management
children.text: Special management practices shall be adopted for the Wildlands Juniper Management Area for the purposes of experimentation, education, interpretation, and demonstration of active and passive management intended to restore the historic fire regime and native vegetation communities on Steens Mountain.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: c Authorization of appropriations
children.text: In addition to the authorization of appropriations in , there is authorized to be appropriated $5,000,000 to carry out this part and regarding juniper management in the Cooperative Management and Protection Area.section 460nnn–121 of this titlesection 460nnn–23(c) of this title
